node.title: Uber | NEW GRAD | USA (NYC or SF) | DECLINED OFFER

topic.title: Uber | NEW GRAD | USA (NYC or SF) | DECLINED OFFER

post.content:
Good luck with you interviews!! Dont give up!!! if you just starting out, this is your sign to keep grinding leetcode. I interviewed for a year before getting here. DONT EVER GIVE UPPPPPP!!!!

**I interviewed with UBER but declined OFFER.** Process lasted 2 months. **Recruiter reached out to me on LinkedIn.**

**1. "Discovery call" with recruiter. Lasted 30min i think.**
    * Deep dive into resume
	* Discuss experience to check if you are right fit for the role
	* Some behavarial questions nothing too tricky

**2. Technical Phone screen with software engineer lasted 1h**
*  	 Regular intro, some background and then Leetcode medium
*  	 Question was about a chest board, Leetcode [688](https://leetcode.com/problems/knight-probability-in-chessboard/)
*  	 Gave 5min to ask questions about Uber

**3.  Virutal Onsite: 4 Rounds**
      1.  Behavarial interview they call:  Collaboration, Citizenship, Operational Execution (Execution & Results), Efficiency & being a force multiplier (Creating Efficiency). This was with a hiring manager
      2.  DSA round 1: Leetcode [64](https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-path-sum/)
      3.  DSA round 2: Ddn't see quesion on leetcode but this was it. Given a 4 * 4 binary grid of integers where all rows are sorted. Find the first column that contains a 1. Obvious brute force was O(n) but interview ask to optimize. Logorithmic time.
      4.  System Design: Split in two parts
		*  First part is to discuss a problem you already solved. I explained my impact in full details and all the technical things I did during one of my project. 
		*  Second part was with new problem. Interveiwer ask me to design a messaging app. Dont be alarmed by the system design rounds if you are new grad they just want to see how you think. 
		
## 4.  Received offer few days after Onsite:****
     * 	Base: $128,250.  (Non negotiable)
     * 	Sign on: $25k (split in 2 years with  clawback)
     * 	Stocks: $95k for 4 years (35% first year// about $33k then. idk now cuz their stock price kept falling and it scared me lol)
     * 	Bonus: $13.5k
     * 	Relocation: $12k (This is only if you have to move 200miles away from your current home)
     * 	TC First YEAR: $208K.   (This was negotiated from $187k because I had competiting offers)
you probably have one hell of an offer if you declined Uber
What team please ? I also have Uber L3 on-site next week this gave me hope
DSA round 2 is similar to Leetcode 74: Search a 2D Matrix (https://leetcode.com/problems/search-a-2d-matrix/)
